response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC Principal Engineer with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 13-14 years of professional experience with only recent, peripheral exposure to AI (MCP tooling at current role since April 2025), no demonstrated AI products/platforms, no advanced degree, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or operating at principal/director scope.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and infrastructure experience across web, mobile, embedded
Community leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source founding (GISCollective)
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms; AI exposure is very recent and shallow
Lacks principal/director-level scope, strategic advisory, or executive influence experience
Limited cloud-platform depth (some AWS CDK) relative to a cloud/AI strategy principal role

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth and recognized expertise
Broad engineering versatility and OSS leadership
